content:
How do I generate an invite link? I'd like to invite the speakers of Categorical Probability and Statistics, and later also more of our audience.

If I click on "Invite users" in the drop-down on the upper right, then I can enter email addresses of people to invite. But I'd rather have an invite link for them to click on: there are too many of them to just copy-and-paste their emails, and including a link in the email that I'm already writing to them would reduce clutter in their inboxes.
Doesn't it say "generate invite link" under the emails box for you?

No, I can apparently only enter email addresses. Here's what it looks like in my browser:

screenshot.png

There's nothing below the list of streams either.
Do other people have the "generate invite link" button? I think I also saw it and used it about a week ago, but it seems to have disappeared.
Only admins can do it. Here you go: https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/1bqz2ickf7n4v2glgvnefjbq/
Damn you beat me to it
If you like I can also customise which channels they are automatically subscribed to. This one is just General
Thanks! Yep, if you could make one where people are subscribed to #general and to #Categorical Probability and Statistics 2020 workshop, that would be perfect.
https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/589tot0izjtr5efghodysuue/

Jules Hedges said:

https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/589tot0izjtr5efghodysuue/

Could you please create a new one like this one? The conference is coming up, and we may get more people. Thanks!

Here's a new one:

https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/zf9mmiai0xracqt7gxdeboxb/

John Baez said:

Here's a new one:

https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/zf9mmiai0xracqt7gxdeboxb/

Thank you!
Could one of the admins generate a new invite link, so that some of my colleagues from University of Antwerp can join?
https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/ucdrmppttiuwzpeqaf09y6fy/
Thank you!
It looks like we need a new invite link, the one just above expired already.
https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/gphxvzfmpsr6xhlyi22gp57u/
Does this still work?
I think they live for 10 days, so it should still be good for a few days
A fresh invite link, please.
Here's one: https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/mhjovmvufp7tduwsco4fzbde/
Here's a new invite link if somebody ever needs it: https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/iyelcvdqh4egmfpmcleto4mu/
I came here just now needing a new invite link...
I keep wanting to send people invite links, and being stuck. Can someone just keep generating invite links every 10 days or something?

Here's one:
https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/y7ftkfvutkd3sspydnbbnfpu/
There was a proposal to remove the need for invite links altogether, but the fear of spam held us back.
I'm personally in favour of just going public, but I think I'm in the minority there
Fresh invite link: https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/yectnpkihmzftfsucbxmxdul/
:robot: Fresh invite link: https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/pdch7cviio4rdqm7oz6vi3i5/
:robot: Fresh invite link: https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/kg3uts4ftkwi2frlf44es6sy/
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/6kccvxj4qjqzicptvmhhri5f/
Thanks!
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/35ot6diw55smxjpfo5hz37x5/
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/45fygfti2ok2nt75r3wn3e7h/
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/6t23lefj4446dt4hqgpk6jbr/
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/6hzz7iat5alinkiplr7bayqz/
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/zclwqzvgpxsw6si7hbdt5jcs/
:robot: Fresh invite link https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/gecefimrwlnqihnsmf5ncii3/
@Matteo Capucci (he/him) can I get a new invite link? Is there a way to get a permanent one btw? People keep asking me to join and my links keep expiring.
In the post directly above yours in this thread there's a working invite link, @Jade Master.
We have decided not to have a permanent one, but you can always get a working one here. (This is a way to increase the probability that people who get links actually know someone here.)
If you need a fresh link, here's one https://categorytheory.zulipchat.com/join/ic6ohsqlubf6f2fi7tsnn3t2/
Maybe we could have a page somewhere with an always working link, so you can link to that
Okay thanks. It's working now.

The existing link worked fine, btw.

I think the slight inconvenience of getting a link is a very useful thing.
It's the difference between inviting your friends to a party and announcing the location of a party in a newspaper ad.

I agree but there's also the downside of being somewhat hidden and closed to new members of the community. A public link to a link sounds as bad as no link, now that I come back to it. But maybe there's should be a 'human link' somewhere, like 'DM me if you want a CT invite'.
I see @Jade Master tweeted something like this some days ago, I may pin a similar tweet to my profile.
I have such a public link on my blog, with a comment saying to let me know if the link has expired.
